Bob Dylan 
February 7 1990 Hammersmith Odeon  London, England

Unknown lineage

02-Most Of The Time 
03-All Along The Watchtower 
04-I'll Be Your Baby Tonight 
05-John Brown 
06-Political World 
07-Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 
08-The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic) 
09-Mama, You Been On My Mind (acoustic) 
10-It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) 
11-Girl From The North Country (acoustic) 
12-Forever Young (acoustic->electric)

01-Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You 
02-Everything Is Broken 
03-Just Like A Woman
